title: ADI IsletCore Protocols for the Isolation, Assessment and Cryopreservation of Human Pancreatic Islets of Langerhans for Research Purposes
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"67l1","text":"This collection of protocols describe the processes used by the Alberta Diabetes Institute IsletCore for the isolation of human pancreatic islets of Langerhans for research. In addition, protocols related to quality control and the cryopreservation of human islets are included. http://www.bcell.org/adi-isletcore.html","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":279,"length":39}],"data":{}},{"key":"46l2r","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"84d6f","text":"The ADI IsletCore program is described in full here:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ba9vi","text":"Lyon J, Manning Fox JE, Spigelman AF, Kim R, Smith N, O'Gorman D, Kin T,  Shapiro AMJ, Rajotte RV, MacDonald PE (2016) Research-focused isolation  of human islets from donors with and without diabetes at the Alberta  Diabetes Institute IsletCore. Endocrinology, 157(2): 560-569.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":1,"offset":247,"length":30}],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"link","mutability":"","data":{"guid":"AE912452A9F911EB8E700A58A9FEAC02","url":"http://www.bcell.org/adi-isletcore.html"}},"1":{"type":"link","mutability":"","data":{"guid":"CDC8A786B7E3475F9760629147ABA65C","url":"http://press.endocrine.org/doi/abs/10.1210/en.2015-1562"}}}}
